idea-plugin.name: LAN Chat
idea-plugin.description:
LAN Chat - Instant messaging tool for local area networks

LAN Chat enables developers to chat with colleagues on the same local network without leaving the IDE.

Key Features

  • Auto Discovery - Automatically scan and discover online colleagues in the LAN
  • Instant Messaging - Send text, images, and files with one click
  • Group Chat - Create groups for efficient team collaboration
  • Secure & Reliable - Peer-to-peer transmission within LAN, data never leaves your network
  • Lightweight - Minimal resource usage, coding and chatting at the same time

Use Cases

  • Team collaboration in enterprise intranet environments
  • Quick communication during remote work
  • Backup communication solution during temporary network outages

Tip: The plugin will automatically scan for online users in the local network after startup.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.2

  • 🐛 修复低版本 IDEA 插件描述符无效的问题
  • 📦 升级 IntelliJ Gradle Plugin 到 1.17.4

1.2.1

  • ✨ 优化好友列表标题，添加头像图标
  • 🔢 群名称限制为最多20个字符
  • 👤 用户昵称限制为最多10个字符
  • 🚫 禁止文件传输助手被邀请入群
  • 📜 许可证更新为 Apache License 2.0

action.description: Send a file to selected contact
